nodes.name: When Executed by WF-001
nodes.notes: Isolated probe trigger. Mirrors SW-005's trigger config (v1.1, passThrough) so the boundary behavior measured here matches what SW-005 would see.

nodes.name: Report Binary Availability
nodes.notes:
Emits a single JSON report. Decision rule:
- getBinaryDataBuffer_ok=true  -> Design A viable (binary crosses & is readable).
- input_has_binary=true but getBinaryDataBuffer_ok=false -> pointer arrives but unresolvable in child -> Design A rejected.
- input_has_binary=false -> binary does not cross at all.
No DB writes, no external calls, no state mutation. Safe to run once and delete.

meta.purpose: Isolated one-shot probe for binary propagation across the Execute Workflow boundary. Not part of CRIE runtime. Delete after result captured.
